p1.title: “Here”: the onboarding drop-off
p1.note: Locus recorded indexically (“here”), not symbolically. Attention was captured, not scanned — the weakest coherence point announced itself once interference was removed.

p2.title: Q3 dashboard redesign (executive template)
p2.note: Spec arrived before any encounter — a {△}→{△} trajectory. “Was this ever recruited?” No (○) trace: imposition, the most resistant death mode. Strengthen the living side before removal.

p3.title: Felt wrongness in the query planner
p3.note: Strong pull, no causal landing yet. Beautiful delusion: feels alive, ungrounded. Needs [□]-contact — a profile, a trace, a failing query — before any naming.

p4.title: Legacy schema migration
p4.note: Competent-dead: grounded, executed, unrecruited. Premature closure — the migration spec froze a partial contact; the name closed instead of opening further encounter.

p5.title: Rename `session` → `encounter`
p5.note: Living name: arrived through contact ({△}(○)), and it is operative ({△}[□]) — it opens new diagnostics: every “session” now asks what actually happened in the encounter.

p6.title: Deprecated auth middleware
p6.note: Fossil: “Was this once alive?” — yes; trace of generative origin persists. Diagnose through contact, strengthen the living side first, then minimum dissolution: remove one constraint, wait, sense reorganization.

p7.title: Button haptics at the coherence boundary
p7.note: Micro scale: haptic contact, seconds of duration. S ≈ θ — Zone 2, the phase transition; P(anchored) ≈ 0.5 and unstable. Stay with the encounter; do not plan past it.

p8.title: Incident review that nobody feels
p8.note: Consequences route to dashboards rather than experiencing selves (⤓ₑ, dashboard substitution). The collective gate needs independent indexical capture — “here” landing on the same locus without prior communication.

p9.title: Weekly “what recruited us?” review
p9.note: Re-sensing the enlarged whole: the weakest point has moved, and edges at layer N+1 were created by resolution at N. The graph produced itself through its own operation.

d1.title: “Cache everything at the edge, always.”
d1.note: Hypothesis generated by resemblance to a past win. High contentiousness χ = 0.9: the position resists yielding until incoming arguments anchor (χ⁽ᵗ⁺¹⁾ = χ⁽ᵗ⁾·(1 − β·S_incoming)).

d2.title: “Invalidate on every write — freshness first.”
d2.note: Dialectical pole of u₁: [□]⎕₁ ⋈ᵈ [□]⎕₂. Lower track record → lower normalized weight w = (Γ + ε₀) / Σᵥ(Γᵥ + ε₀).

d3.title: p99 latency traces from the last three incidents
d3.note: Evidence integration: the index points at what actually happened. ↑σ_support (ρ) and ↓σ_disagreement (Jensen–Shannon divergence) are tracked on Σᶜᵒⁿᵛ.

d4.title: Moderator: plateau π flagged on σ_disagreement
d4.note: Relative progress r⁽ᵗ⁾σ < ε_rel persisted for t_persist rounds → πσ. The moderator schedules the phase transition →|π and tightens τ toward convergence.

d5.title: ⋗ᵉ Tiered TTL, tuned by incident memory
d5.note: Emergent genesis (⋗ᵉ): incident-driven tuning is a property present in neither parent — not “cache everything”, not “invalidate always”. Mediation adequacy was sufficient; tension duration and intensity crossed threshold.

d6.title: HALT probe
d6.note: HALT ⟺ plateau persists while the gate passes and quality is sufficient. Bounded expectation: E[t_halt] = O(1/ε) for gated averaging; O(log 1/ε) under contraction.

r1.title: Experiential map: who actually feels deploy pain?
r1.note: Map every level of the system to its experiencer. The dead zones — consequences that land on no one — are where feedback-without-interiority takes root.

r2.title: Purpose excavation: the 99.9% uptime KPI
r2.note: Stated purpose: reliability. Revealed purpose: green dashboards. PMG = 1 − correlation(metric, purpose_outcomes) is the space into which optimization pressure leaks. Purpose debt D(t) = ∫ PMG du has been accruing for years.

r3.title: Gaming census ≥ depth 3: the review leaderboard
r3.note: Depth 1: rubber-stamp approvals. Depth 2: splitting PRs to farm count. Depth 3: the anti-gaming linter is now itself optimized (meta-hacking recursion ⟨⟨⟩⟩). Gaming lives in the null space of the representation.

r4.title: On-call feels the alert they wrote
r4.note: Shorten the loop action → consequence → experience → identity → action. A system stays aligned only as long as action reshapes the actor: alignment ∝ experiential_return.

r5.title: The Thursday deploy freeze
r5.note: Before removing the freeze, understand what experience it encodes: it is the fossil of a catastrophic Thursday incident — load-bearing friction, not vestigial. Removal leaves a void with no latent structure to fill it.

r6.title: Alert noise below the felt threshold
r6.note: Exit when the on-call's experienced noise — not the dashboard's — falls below threshold. Guard against experiential theatre: a retro where nobody's identity is at stake is {△} ritual, not (○) contact.

tut3.title: The onboarding drop-off, re-recruited
tut3.note: Living and ready — but even living cards walk one column at a time.

trace.note: practice card — One gate at a time
